betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§7§oWow, you actually went ahead and crafted this! You are crazy!

§fReality, brought to the forefront, defined.
Is it possible to describe the entirety of creation with a single word? Well, Probably not. 
This material, this alloy (if you can call it an alloy), though, seems to share many of the traits I would expect from a of a 'universal' object.
It is distinct, and it possesses distinct properties, and yet it encompasses the properties of everything else. Not just a sum of its parts. Neither more or less than a sum of its parts. Just, different, and yet alike.
Like a gerat and original book drawing inspiration from prior works. You can see the similarities, the echoes, of other things, and yet, it is distinctly unique.
The Arbiter was (is?) a genious, likely the smarterst to ever live. I feel humbled and proud to follow in their steps.
